app_description: Offline-first professional assessment app for sport and health professionals.
home_description: Offline-first professional assessment app for sport and health professionals.
home_intro: This is the initial technical base for OSSMA, ready for focused offline-first features.
home_clients_description: Manage evaluated people and their assessment history.
home_backups_description: Export and import local data manually.
home_settings_description: Adjust language, theme, navigation and preferences.
home_local_workspace_description: Your OSSMA workspace is prepared for local data, manual control, and future offline-first modules.
home_main_areas_description: Access the main areas of the application.
home_quick_actions_description: Access the main areas of the application.
home_about_description: OSSMA is an open source, offline-first and local-first application for sport and health professionals.
home_about_contribute: The project welcomes contributions, reviews, documentation improvements, and technical feedback.
home_about_open_source: Open source and free under the MIT license.
home_about_local_first: Designed as an offline-first and local-first tool.
home_about_stack: Built with SvelteKit, TypeScript, Paraglide, Vitest, ESLint, and Prettier.
home_about_early_development: Early development foundation without production data or backend requirements.
home_initial_foundation_note: Initial foundation with layout, themes, localization, settings, and onboarding shell.
page_clients_description: Manage evaluated people and their assessment history.
page_clients_placeholder: Client records, anamnesis links, and assessment history will be implemented in a future milestone.
page_profile_placeholder: Professional and institution profile setup will be implemented in a future milestone.
page_backups_description: Export and import local data manually.
page_backups_placeholder: Backup export and restore tools will be implemented after the local data model is ready.
page_faqs_description: Find common questions and answers about the application.
page_faqs_placeholder: Frequently asked questions will be organized as the product behavior becomes stable.
page_docs_description: Read technical guidance, protocols, and usage documentation.
page_docs_placeholder: Documentation pages will connect to the project guides in a future milestone.
page_settings_description: Adjust language, theme, navigation, and preferences.
settings_description: Adjust local interface preferences for this device.
settings_menu_display_description: Choose whether navigation items show icons with text or icons only.
settings_save_behavior: Changes are saved automatically on this device.
settings_local_notice: These preferences are stored locally on this device.
onboarding_welcome_description: Configure the basics before using the app.
onboarding_welcome_local_first: OSSMA is designed to work locally on your device and support offline-first professional workflows.
onboarding_usage_mode_title: Choose how you will use OSSMA
onboarding_profile_description: Professional and institution profiles will be configured in a later milestone.
onboarding_finish_description: You will be able to manage clients, perform assessments, and generate professional reports in upcoming modules.
